review_questions: Does the candidate allow compiler work only from closed approved and hashed P3 inputs?
Does it preserve approved natural-language sections as semantic authority while using inventory only as verification skeleton?
Does deterministic assembly reject filesystem, time, locale, random, git status, and JSON object iteration ordering?
Does semantic conservation block additions, omissions, hash drift, unapproved inputs, non-atomic units, ordering issues, and nondeterminism?
Do final manifest, toc, reference index, hash index, semantic inventory, conservation report, and FINAL_DRD text mutually bind each other?
Does read-only QA remain unable to mutate compiled artifacts?
Does the candidate avoid locks, repository code, compiler fixtures, prior P3 candidate mutation, and root P3 phase-file mutation?
